name: Cron report reliability upgrade
definitionOfDone: Project render-cron-report.js retries transient Render and network failures
Project cron report jobs health-ping /control/health before sending reports
Project cron logs include structured attempt records with runId and reportType
Final failure alerts are sent only after retries are exhausted
Project Render cron env uses project-local control key and header prefix
Project manifest and upgrade record are updated after local verification
